nodes.label: AI Innovation
nodes.summary: AI is rapidly transforming businesses, creating opportunities for innovation, efficiency, and growth through automation, hyper-personalization, data-driven decision making, and product innovation. However, businesses must also navigate challenges such as ethical implementation, workforce transformation, data quality and privacy, and integration complexity to successfully integrate AI technologies. The future of business will require a human-centered approach that balances innovation with responsibility.

nodes.label: Agentic-Design-Patterns
nodes.summary: Agentic Design Patterns is a 424-page book by Antonio Gulli that provides a hands-on guide to building intelligent systems using agentic design patterns. The book covers various topics, including prompt chaining, routing, parallelization, reflection, tool use, planning, multi-agent systems, memory management, learning and adaptation, model context protocol, goal setting and monitoring, exception handling and recovery, human-in-the-loop, knowledge retrieval, inter-agent communication, resource-aware optimization, reasoning techniques, guardrails/safety patterns, evaluation and monitoring, prioritization, exploration and discovery, advanced prompting techniques, and more.

nodes.label: AI and UX
nodes.summary:
Why Artificial Intelligence Needs User Experience ― Gavin Lew Robert M. Schumacher Jr.  AI and UX

AI AND UX  WHY ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE NEEDS USER EXPERIENCE  Gavin Lew Robert M. Schumacher Jr.

AI and UX: Why Artificial Intelligence Need

nodes.label: AI+UX+revision+08062023
nodes.summary: This article maps the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in User Experience (UX) design and identifies its potential to improve efficiency, accuracy, and innovation in UX processes. The study analyzes 46 research articles on AI's role in UX design, highlighting its applications in understanding user context, uncovering requirements, aiding solution design, and evaluating designs.

nodes.label: agentic-ai-the-new-frontier-in-genai-an-executive-playbook
nodes.summary: Agentic AI refers to AI systems that possess autonomy, goal-oriented behavior, environment interaction, learning capability, workflow optimisation, multi-agent and system conversation. Agentic AI is transforming various industries with its advanced human-like reasoning and interaction capabilities, enabling businesses to automate routine tasks, enhance customer experiences, and drive revenue growth. The technology involves multiple AI agents working together to solve complex problems and automate processes, with estimates suggesting it could contribute $2.6 trillion to global GDP by 2030.

nodes.label: Agentic-AI-with-Lang-Chain-and-Lang-Graph-Training-Course
nodes.summary: Agentic AI is a type of autonomous AI that operates independently, making decisions and acting proactively to achieve goals in dynamic environments without constant human supervision. It has key characteristics such as autonomy, goal-oriented behavior, adaptability, contextual awareness, action-oriented behavior, self-improvement, collaboration, tool utilization, and more. Agentic AI systems use various frameworks and tools, including large language models, AI agents, fine-tuning agent instructions, multiagent collaboration, feedback mechanisms, prompt engineering, and data flywheels to operate autonomously and make decisions in real-world applications.

nodes.label: A practical guide to building agents
nodes.summary: Agents are systems that independently accomplish tasks on behalf of a user, leveraging an LLM for workflow execution and decision-making. Building an agent requires rethinking how systems make decisions and handle complexity, particularly in workflows with complex decision-making, difficult-to-maintain rules, or heavy reliance on unstructured data. An agent consists of three core components: model, tools, and instructions, which can be selected and configured to meet specific use cases.

nodes.label: Ebook-Agentic-AI
nodes.summary: Agentic AI is a type of artificial intelligence that enables autonomous decision-making, allowing organizations to drive greater efficiency and precision in their operations and innovations. It combines the capabilities of machine learning models with business insights to develop cutting-edge AI products and solutions.

nodes.label: ITI Agentic AI
nodes.summary: Agentic AI systems are applications of generative AI technology with multi-step planning and reasoning capabilities that can autonomously query and select tools within boundaries set by users to execute on user-defined tasks or achieve outcomes. These systems typically comprise data, a decision-making engine (LLM or SLM), system architecture, and tools, and involve various actors such as data curators, developers of LLMs or SLMs, system architects, tool developers, and agentic AI system integrators.

nodes.label: Building Agentic AI
nodes.summary: This book, "Building Agentic AI Workflows, Fine-Tuning, Optimization, and Deployment" by Sinan Ozdemir, provides proven strategies for designing, managing, and mastering AI systems that deliver tangible results. It focuses on three areas: Hands-On Engineering, Strategic Orchestration, and Foundational Principles, aiming to connect these areas and foster the mindset of an AI builder. The book covers topics such as LLM workflows, AI agents, multimodal and coding AI, fine-tuning, optimization, and deployment, providing readers with expertise to build and deploy AI systems in real-world scenarios.

nodes.label: The-Complete-Guide-to-Building-Skill-for-Claude
nodes.summary: A skill is a folder containing instructions, executable code, and other assets that teaches Claude how to handle specific tasks or workflows. Skills are powerful when used with repeatable workflows, allowing users to teach Claude once and benefit every time. The guide covers everything needed to build effective skills, including planning and design, testing, and distribution, for developers, power users, and teams looking to standardize how Claude works across their organization.

nodes.label: Learning_Python

The book covers various topics including getting started with Python, running programs, types and operations, numeric types, dynamic typing, strings, and more.
